channel.title: Claude on Aaron's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Aaron's Blog

item.title: Igris Pi Runtime Stack
item.description: Igris runs 24/7 on pi5desktop as a Claude Code Slack bot. Local and cloud MCPs, per-thread session memory. Always available, always on.

item.title: Igris Pi Runtime Stack Live
item.description: Igris is now live 24/7 on pi5desktop as a Claude Code Slack bot. The AI advisor is always on, always available — no longer dependent on a laptop session.
